summary: I used the local `cautilus` skill and ran the checked-in fixture flow with `cautilus skill test --repo-root . --adapter-name self-dogfood-skill-test`. The exact failing command path was `./bin/cautilus install --repo-root . --overwrite` from the adapter preflight, and it stopped because `.agents/skills/cautilus/SKILL.md` was read-only in this sandbox. Recommendation: rerun in a writable checkout or change the preflight to avoid `install --overwrite` when the bundled skill surface is already materialized.
